response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software engineering experience and demonstrates strong technical skills across multiple languages and domains, including AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq. However, his lack of explicit AI-focused academic or entrepreneurial background, along with limited direct AI product development experience, reduces his fit for the Principal Engineer role. His contributions to open-source and technical talks are commendable but do not fully align with the AI strategy focus required.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with deep technical fluency in multiple languages and systems
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq
Entrepreneurial background with GISCollective and open-source contributions
concerns: Limited direct experience with AI-powered product development or cloud/AI platform strategy
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related fields
No explicit mention of strategic customer advisory or large-scale AI platform implementation
